title: Project Manager - Mechanical Construction
description_raw:
Hays Middle East are recruiting an experienced Project Manager for a mechanical construction contract in Dubai, UAE. The role involves managing the delivery of HVAC and mechanical systems for a major mixed-use development.

Key responsibilities:
- Manage the project plan, risk register, and milestone schedule
- Lead stakeholder management across the client, principal contractor, and specialist subcontractors
- Coordinate HVAC, pipework, and mechanical plant installation activities
- Report on cost (EVM) and schedule performance to the programme director

Requirements:
- 7+ years mechanical project management experience in the GCC
- Chartered engineer (mechanical) preferred

Rate: AED 2,000 per day
Duration: 12 months
Start: October 2026
Location: Dubai, UAE
